Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 14), dh-sequence-python3, pybuild-plugin-pyproject, python3-all, python3-axisregistry <!nocheck>, python3-bs4 <!nocheck>, python3-fontfeatures, python3-fontmake <!nocheck>, python3-fonttools, python3-gflanguages, python3-gfsubsets, python3-github <!nocheck>, python3-glyphsets, python3-networkx <!nocheck>, python3-ots <!nocheck>, python3-pil <!nocheck>, python3-protobuf, python3-pygit2 <!nocheck>, python3-pytest <!nocheck>, python3-setuptools, python3-setuptools-scm, python3-strictyaml, python3-tabulate, python3-ttfautohint-py, python3-unidecode <!nocheck>, python3-vharfbuzz, python3-yaml, ufomerge
Description: Google Fonts Tools This project contains tools used for working with the Google Fonts collection, plus Google Fonts Glyph Set Documentation in the /encodings subdirectory. While these tools are primarily intended for contributors to the Google Fonts project, anyone who works with fonts could find them useful.
Package-List: gftools deb fonts optional arch=all python3-gftools deb python optional arch=all
